(i) These bye-laws may be called the Coir Board Employees (Conduct) Amendment bye-laws, 1989. (ii) They shall come in to force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Tn bye-law 2, for the Explanation given under sub-clause (b) of clause (g), the following "Explanation" shall be substituted, namely :- '"Explattatiotl" :--Group A, Group B, Group C and Group D posts shall mean those posts having the following description :- Sl. Doscription of posts No. I. A post c.trrying a pay or a scale of pay with a maximum of not less than Rs. 4.000/- 2. A post c:trrying a pay or a scale of pay with a maximllm of not less than Rs. 2,900/- but less thaf' Rs. 4,000/- 3. A post carrying a pay or a scale of pay with a Cht 'sification of posts Group A Group B maximum of over Rs: l, 150/- ·but less than Rs. 2,900/- ·· Group C .... .,,., l-" . ;..,.:.._:.:,._: ~-·- > ,.
